events.name: Barat Mandir Visit
events.description: The Barat will first visit the nearby Mandir for blessings before heading towards the main gathering point.
events.guest_tip: Family members joining the Mandir visit are requested to reach a few minutes early.

events.name: Barat Meet-up
events.venue: Golmuri Circle, Sakchi, near Howrah Bridge, New Kalimati Road, Jamshedpur
events.description: All guests are requested to gather at Golmuri Circle where the Barat will assemble before the grand procession begins.
events.guest_tip: Please reach 10–15 minutes early so we can start the procession smoothly.

events.name: Barat Procession
events.venue: Golmuri Circle to Golden Iris, Jamshedpur
events.description: The Barat procession will begin from Golmuri Circle and proceed joyfully towards Golden Iris with music, dancing, and celebrations.
events.guest_tip: Get ready for music, dance, and a festive procession!
